creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
- update to 2.1.9
- remove irrelevant patches:
    deleted:    files/patch-.._ebin_ejabberd.app
    deleted:    files/patch-ejabberd.app
- fix portlint warning (move LICENSE into it's own place)
- whitespace fix in pkg-descr

Works fine here on FreeBSD 10.0-CURRENT i386 with erlang-r14b04_1,1.
Hope this patch will find it's way to 9.0R DVD :)

Please also note that 2.1.9 distfile is half less than 2.1.8 distfile - it's
because of guide.pdf removal.

changelog (notable many LDAP improvements):
http://www.ejabberd.im/ejabberd-2.1.9
